'''Bastien Ader''' (born 6 June 1991) is a French [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|ce}} or on the {{rlp|wg}} for [[Limoux Grizzlies]] in [[Elite 1 (rugby league)|Elite 1]]. He previously spent 10 years with [[Toulouse Olympique]] in both [[Elite 1 (rugby league)|Elite 1]] and the [[RFL Championship]] and began his career at [[Saint-Gaudens Bears|Saint Gaudens XIII]].

==Club career==
===Saint Gaudens XIII===
Ader debuted for St Gaudens on 3 October 2009 in the 34-10 defeat at [[Limoux Grizzlies|Limoux]] and played once more that season, away at Carcassonne. He made a further 18 appearances in the 2010/11 season before signing for Toulouse.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.itsrugby.co.uk/players/bastien-ader-18518.html|title= ADER Bastien player stats|website=www.itsrugby.co.uk}}</ref>

===Toulouse Olympique Broncos===
He joined Toulouse in 2011<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/bastien-ader-commits-to-toulouse/|title = Bastien Ader commits to Toulouse|date = 16 November 2016}}</ref> and made his debut in the 22-0 defeat away at Avignon on 9 December 2011 in [[Elite 1 (rugby league)|Elite 1]]. At the end of 2011, Toulouse left the [[2011 RFL Championship|English Championship]] and returned to the French league. Ader played 10 games in Elite 1 at the start of the 2015/16 for the Broncos in the hiatus between the end of the 2014/15 season and Toulouse returning to the English competition in 2016.

===Toulouse Olympique===
Ader played in the first team from 2012/13 until 2020 in Elite 1, [[RFL League 1|League 1]] and the [[RFL Championship]]. He did not appear for Toulouse in the 2021 promotion winning season. On 20 September 2021, Toulouse announced that Ader would be leaving the club at the end of the season after 10 years<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.to13.com/actualites/bastien-ader-quittera-le-to-au-terme-de-la-saison/|title=Bastien ADER will leave at the end of the season|website=www.to13.com|date=20 September 2021}}</ref>

===Limoux Grizzlies===
Limoux announced that Ader had signed up for the 2021/22 season having left Toulouse.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.facebook.com/13Limouxin/|title=Bastien ADER joins Limoux XIII-Limoux XIII Facebook site|website=[[Facebook]]|date=September 20, 2021}}</ref>

==International career==
Ader was named in the [[France national rugby league team|French squad]] for the [[2017 Rugby League World Cup]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.ffr13.fr/bastien-ader-clement-boyer-et-mark-kheirallah-selectionnes-pour-la-coupe-du-monde/ |title=Bastien ADER, Clément BOYER et Mark KHEIRALLAH sélectionnés pour la Coupe du Monde |publisher=FFRXIII |language=fr |date=3 October 2017 |access-date=1 August 2024}}</ref> He played in all three group matches and was the top scorer for France with two tries.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.ffr13.fr/nouveau-statut-pour-bastien-ader-au-to/ |title=Nouveau statut pour Bastien ADER au TO |publisher=FFRXIII |language=fr |date=22 November 2017 |access-date=1 August 2024}}</ref>
